entries.summary: Public-ready Hydrogen Technology Ontology release baseline.
changes: Separated 36 schema subjects, 1848 controlled vocabulary subjects, and 1519 example or data-like subjects.
Generated or normalized 5754 annotations and metadata updates for version 2026.3.0.
Published 366 mapped review rows across the alignment outputs.
Validation status is pass with SHACL conforms set to True.
notes: No prior published ontology version was registered in the current release profile, so this release acts as the initial curated public baseline.
Placeholder definitions and unmapped local vocabulary terms remain explicit editorial follow-up items rather than being hidden.
